CheckTitle: Check if E2E Cloud ALB/HTTPS load balancers use an SSL certificate
Description: Check if E2E Cloud application load balancers serving HTTPS traffic have an SSL certificate configured.
Risk: HTTPS load balancers without a valid SSL certificate expose traffic to interception and downgrade attacks, weakening confidentiality and integrity for client connections.

Recommendation.Text: Attach a valid SSL certificate to HTTPS load balancers.
